products.name: Cantata
products.descriptor: Automated unit and integration testing tool for C/C++ code

products.name: Astrée
products.descriptor: Sound static analysis tool proving absence of runtime errors and data races in C/C++

evidence.snippet:
Astrée Datasheet
----------------
Accelerate Finding All Runtime Errors & Data Races in C/C++With Sound Static Analysis.

products.name: QA-MISRA
products.descriptor: Automated static analysis tool for C/C++ coding standards compliance

evidence.snippet:
QA-MISRA Datasheet
------------------
QA-MISRA automates static analysis of C/C++ source code to verify compliance with multiple standards such as MISRA C/C++, AUTOSAR, CERT C/C++ and CWE. It provides a single set of configurable rules to check compliance with all these coding standards.

products.name: AdaTEST 95
products.descriptor: Automated unit and integration testing tool for Ada code

evidence.snippet:
AdaTEST 95 Datasheet
--------------------
Efficiently perform unit and integration testing using AdaTEST 95. The product offers high productivity and a unique set of testing, coverage analysis and static analysis features.

products.name: Cantata Hybrid
products.descriptor: Certification engine for GoogleTest suites enabling safety standards compliance

evidence.snippet:
Introducing Cantata Hybrid: the world’s first certification engine for Google tests.
This specialized subset of Cantata is a cost-effective alternative that allows developers to run existing GoogleTest suites to generate test results evidence and code coverage from a certified unit test tool.

products.name: Cantata Team Reporting
products.descriptor: Web-based test status management dashboard add-on for Cantata

evidence.snippet:
Cantata Team Reporting Datasheet
--------------------------------
Add-on product, featuring a client-server architecture, web interface, and REST API, empowers teams to enhance efficiency and collaboration.
